```{r Finding PT cells with high BMscore}
Percentage <- c(c(length(WhichCells(PTCells, expression = BMALike == "BM-A Like" & BMBLike == "Not BM-B Like" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1"))/length(colnames(subset(PTCells, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1")))), c(length(WhichCells(PTCells, expression = BMALike == "BM-A Like" & BMBLike == "BM-B Like" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1"))/length(colnames(subset(PTCells, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1")))), c(length(WhichCells(PTCells, expression = BMALike == "Not BM-A Like" & BMBLike == "BM-B Like" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1"))/length(colnames(subset(PTCells, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1")))), c(length(WhichCells(PTCells, expression = BMALike == "BM-A Like" & BMBLike == "Not BM-B Like" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2"))/length(colnames(subset(PTCells, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2")))), c(length(WhichCells(PTCells, expression = BMALike == "BM-A Like" & BMBLike == "BM-B Like" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2"))/length(colnames(subset(PTCells, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2")))), c(length(WhichCells(PTCells, expression = BMALike == "Not BM-A Like" & BMBLike == "BM-B Like" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2"))/length(colnames(subset(PTCells, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2")))), c(length(WhichCells(PTCells, expression = BMALike == "BM-A Like" & BMBLike == "Not BM-B Like" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3"))/length(colnames(subset(PTCells, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3")))), c(length(WhichCells(PTCells, expression = BMALike == "BM-A Like" & BMBLike == "BM-B Like" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3"))/length(colnames(subset(PTCells, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3")))), c(length(WhichCells(PTCells, expression = BMALike == "Not BM-A Like" & BMBLike == "BM-B Like" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3"))/length(colnames(subset(PTCells, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3")))))

barplotData3 <- data.frame(CellLine, Signature, Percentage)
ggplot(barplotData3, aes(fill=factor(Signature, levels = c("BM-B Like", "Both", "BM-A Like")), y=Percentage, x=CellLine)) + 
  geom_bar(position = "stack", stat = "identity", width = 0.8) + 
  geom_col() + 
  ggtitle("Percentage cells with BM profile") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Both" = "#FF0000", "BM-A Like" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B Like" = "#990000")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 0.30, by = 0.05), labels = scales::label_percent(), expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("LU-NB-1_PT", "LU-NB-2_PT", "LU-NB-3_PT"), labels = c("LU-NB-1", "LU-NB-2", "LU-NB-3")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Percentage > 0.0001, 100*round(Percentage, 4), "")), position = position_stack(vjust = 1), vjust = -0.5, color = "black", size = 4) +
  theme(
  legend.position = "right",
  legend.title = element_blank(),
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
  axis.title.y = element_blank(),
  axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1.5, lineend = "square"),
  axis.ticks.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 1.5),
  axis.ticks.length.y = unit(0.2, "cm"),
  axis.line.x = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, , colour = c(PDX_colours[1], PDX_colours[2], PDX_colours[3])),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
  panel.grid = element_blank(),
  text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black")
)

Figure18 <- ggplot(barplotData3, aes(fill=Signature, y=Percentage, x=CellLine, size=8)) + 
  geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity", width = 0.9) + 
  ggtitle("Percentage of BM-A/BM-B Like PT Cells") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Both" = "#FF0000", "BM-A Like" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B Like" = "#990000")) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("LU-NB-1_PT", "LU-NB-2_PT", "LU-NB-3_PT"), labels = c("LU-NB-1", "LU-NB-2", "LU-NB-3")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 0.10, by = 0.01), labels = scales::label_percent(), expand = expansion(0, c(0, 0.05))) +
  geom_text(aes(label = 100*round(Percentage, 4)), 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.8, color =  "black", size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 15, colour = c(PDX_colours[1], PDX_colours[2], PDX_colours[3])),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
  text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black")
)

saveplots(Figure18, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot all BMLike PT Cells in PDX")
svg("Barplot all BMLike PT Cells in PDX.svg")
Figure18
dev.off()

Figure12
Figure13
Figure14
Figure15
Figure18
```

```{r Connection between BMA/BMB och ADRN/MES}
onlyBM <- subset(IntegratedObject, Tissue == "BM")
onlyBM$type <- ifelse(onlyBM$`BM-Ascore1` > BMAmean & onlyBM$`BM-Bscore1` > BMBmean, "Both", ifelse(onlyBM$`BM-Ascore1` > BMAmean, "BM-A", ifelse(onlyBM$`BM-Bscore1` > BMBmean, "BM-B", "Other")))

VlnPlot(onlyBM, features = c("BM-Ascore1", "BM-Bscore1", "BMdiff"), group.by = "type", pt.size = 0, cols = c("BM-A" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B" = "#990000"))
VlnPlot(onlyBM, features = c("ADRN_Score1", "MES_Score1"), group.by = "type", pt.size = 0, cols = c("BM-A" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B" = "#990000"))

AdrnMesBMtype <- VlnPlot(onlyBM, features = c("ADRNMESdiff"), group.by = "type", pt.size = 0, cols = c("BM-A Like" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B Like" = "#990000"))+ geom_boxplot(fill = "white", alpha = 0.5, width = 0.5,outliers = F) + stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2, fill = "white", color = "black") + ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova", label.y = max(onlyBM@meta.data$ADRNMESdiff, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95)


ScatterStateBMtype1 <- FeatureScatter(onlyBM, cells = WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1"), feature1 = "ADRNMESdiff", feature2 = "BMdiff", group.by = "Cell_Line_n", cols = c(PDX_colours)) + ggtitle("LU-NB-1: -0.24") + geom_smooth(method = 'lm') + NoLegend() + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1), plot.title = element_text(colour = PDX_colours[1])) + ylab("BM-A - BM-B") + xlab("Mes - Adrn") 
ScatterStateBMtype2 <- FeatureScatter(onlyBM, cells = WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2"), feature1 = "ADRNMESdiff", feature2 = "BMdiff", group.by = "Cell_Line_n", cols = c(PDX_colours)) + ggtitle("LU-NB-2: 0.07") + geom_smooth(method = 'lm') + NoLegend() +  theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1), plot.title = element_text(colour = PDX_colours[2])) + xlab("Mes - Adrn")
ScatterStateBMtype3 <- FeatureScatter(onlyBM, cells = WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3"), feature1 = "ADRNMESdiff", feature2 = "BMdiff", group.by = "Cell_Line_n", cols = c(PDX_colours)) + ggtitle("LU-NB-3: -0.14") + geom_smooth(method = 'lm') + NoLegend() + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title.y = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1), plot.title = element_text(colour = PDX_colours[3])) + xlab("Mes - Adrn")
ScatterStateBMtype <- wrap_plots(ScatterStateBMtype1, ScatterStateBMtype2, ScatterStateBMtype3, ncol = 3)


saveplots(ScatterStateBMtype, "../BM Publication/", "Scatterplot BMdiff vs AdrnMesDiff", w = 2000)
svg("Scatterplot BMdiff vs AdrnMesDiff.svg", width = 12, height = 6)
ScatterStateBMtype
dev.off()
saveplots(AdrnMesBMtype, "../BM Publication/", "VlnPlot AdrnMesDiff in BMtype", w = 1000)
svg("VlnPlot AdrnMesDiff in BMtype.svg")
AdrnMesBMtype
dev.off()
```

```{r BMA and BMB comparison}
#Barplot of BMA/B cells in BM per PDX
CellLine <- c(rep(c("LU-NB-1_BM", "LU-NB-2_BM", "LU-NB-3_BM"), each = 3))
Signature <- c(rep(c("BM-A Cells", "Both", "BM-B Cells"), times = 3))
Percentage <- c(c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-A" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "Both" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-B" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-A" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "Both" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-B" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-A" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "Both" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-B" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3")))))

barplotData4 <- data.frame(CellLine, Signature, Percentage)
BarplotBM <- ggplot(barplotData4, aes(fill=Signature, y=Percentage, x=CellLine, size=8)) + 
  geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity", width = 0.9) + 
  ggtitle("Percentage of BM-A/BM-B Cells") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Both" = "#FF0000", "BM-A Cells" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B Cells" = "#990000")) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("LU-NB-1_BM", "LU-NB-2_BM", "LU-NB-3_BM"), labels = c("LU-NB-1", "LU-NB-2", "LU-NB-3")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 0.50, by = 0.1), labels = scales::label_percent(), expand = expansion(0, c(0, 0.05))) +
  geom_text(aes(label = 100*round(Percentage, 4)), 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.8, color =  "black", size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 0.5, size = 15, colour = c(PDX_colours[1], PDX_colours[2], PDX_colours[3])),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
  text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black")
)

#Saving plot
saveplots(BarplotBM, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot BM type in BM")
svg("Barplot BM type in BM.svg")
BarplotBM
dev.off()
BarplotBM

```

```{r New umap with only BM cells}
#Reprocessing
DefaultAssay(onlyBM) <- "RNA"
onlyBM[["SCT"]] <- NULL 
onlyBM <- JoinLayers(onlyBM)
onlyBM[["RNA"]] <- split(onlyBM[["RNA"]], f = onlyBM$orig.ident)
onlyBM <- SCTransform(onlyBM, vars.to.regress = c("nFeature_RNA", 'nCount_RNA', "percent_mito", "cc_difference", "percent_ribo"), return.only.var.genes = FALSE, verbose = TRUE)
DefaultAssay(onlyBM) <- "SCT"
onlyBM <- RunPCA(onlyBM, seed.use = 1999,verbose = FALSE)
ElbowPlot(onlyBM, ndims = 50)
onlyBM <- IntegrateLayers(object = onlyBM, method = HarmonyIntegration, orig.reduction = "pca", dims = 1:30, new.reduction = "integrated.harmony", normalization.method = "SCT", k.weight = 50, verbose = FALSE)
onlyBM <- RunUMAP(onlyBM, reduction = "integrated.harmony", reduction.name = "umap.harmony", dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE,seed.use = 1999)

#Plotting
UMAPBM <- DimPlot(onlyBM, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "Cell_Line_n", cols = c(PDX_colours), pt.size = 0.8) + ggtitle("UMAP of BM cells") + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1)) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")
DimPlot(onlyBM, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "type", cols = c("BM-A" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B" = "#990000", "Both" = "#FF0000", "Other" = "lightgrey"), pt.size = 0.8) + ggtitle("UMAP of BM cells") + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1)) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")
DimPlot(onlyBM, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "type", cols = c("BM-A" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B" = "#990000", "Both" = "#FF0000", "Other" = "lightgrey"), pt.size = 0.8) + ggtitle("UMAP of BM cells") + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1)) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")

saveplots(UMAPBM, "../BM Publication/", "UMAP BM by PDX", w = 1050)
svg("UMAP BM by PDX.svg")
UMAPBM
dev.off()
BarplotBM

#Combining features
FeaturePlot(onlyBM, features = c("BM-Ascore1", "BM-Bscore1"), reduction = "umap.harmony", order = TRUE, combine = FALSE, blend = TRUE)
FeaturePlot(onlyBM, features = c("ADRN_Score1", "MES_Score1"), reduction = "umap.harmony", blend = TRUE, combine = FALSE)

FeaturePlot(onlyBM, features = c("BM-Ascore1"), reduction = "umap.harmony", cols = c("lightgrey", "red")) + ggtitle("BM-A score") + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1)) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")
FeaturePlot(onlyBM, features = c("BM-Bscore1"), reduction = "umap.harmony", cols = c("lightgrey", "red")) + ggtitle("BM-B score") + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1)) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")
FeaturePlot(onlyBM, features = c("BMdiff"), reduction = "umap.harmony", cols = c("yellow", "#800080")) + ggtitle("BM-A - BM-B") + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1)) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")
```


```{r Saving all Plots}
setwd("~/Forskning/Neuroblastoma Met/BM Publication/")

#Function that saves plots, from Gustav
saveplots <- function(object,location,filename,w = 900,h = 900,pointsize = 12,res = 150){
  setwd("~/Forskning/Neuroblastoma Met/BM Publication/")
  png(paste0(location,filename,".png"),width = w, height = h, units = "px", pointsize = pointsize, res = res)
  print(object)
  dev.off()
  ggsave(path = location,filename = paste0(filename,".eps"), plot = object,width = w,height = h,dpi = res, units = "px")
}


saveplots(Figure1, "../BM Publication/", "UMAP PDX", w = 1050)
svg("UMAP PDX.svg", width = 9)
Figure1
dev.off()
saveplots(Figure2, "../BM Publication/", "UMAP split", w = 1200)
svg("UMAP split.svg", width = 9)
Figure2
dev.off()
saveplots(Figure3, "../BM Publication/", "UMAP Clustered", w = 1050)
svg("UMAP Clustered.svg", width = 9)
Figure3
dev.off()
saveplots(Figure4, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot Clusters in PDX")
svg("Barplot Clusters in PDX.svg")
Figure4
dev.off()

#saveplots(Figure5, "../", "Heatmap Clustermarkers")
cairo_ps("Heatmap Clustermarkers.eps", width = 4000, height = 2500)
Figure5
dev.off()
png("Heatmap Clustermarkers.png", width = 4000, height = 2500, res = 300)
Figure5
dev.off()
svg("Heatmap Clustermarkers.svg", width = 25, height = 15)
Figure5
dev.off()

saveplots(Figure6, "../BM Publication/", "Dotplot Clustermarkers", w = 3000)
svg("Dotplot Clustermarkers.svg", width = 20)
Figure6
dev.off()
saveplots(Figure7, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot Clusters in Site")
svg("Barplot Clusters in Site.svg")
Figure7
dev.off()
saveplots(Figure8, "../BM Publication/", "Dotplot DEG", w = 1000)
svg("Dotplot DEG.svg")
Figure8
dev.off()

saveplots(Figure12, "../BM Publication/", "UMAP BM1Like PT Cells", w = 1050)
svg("UMAP BM1Like PT Cells.svg", width = 9)
Figure12
dev.off()
saveplots(Figure13, "../BM Publication/", "UMAP BM2Like PT Cells", w = 1050)
svg("UMAP BM2Like PT Cells.svg", width = 9)
Figure13
dev.off()

saveplots(Figure14, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot BMALike PT Cells in PDX")
svg("Barplot BMALike PT Cells in PDX.svg")
Figure14
dev.off()
saveplots(Figure15, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot BMBLike PT Cells in PDX")
svg("Barplot BMBLike PT Cells in PDX.svg")
Figure15
dev.off()

saveplots(Figure18, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot all BMLike PT Cells in PDX")
svg("Barplot all BMLike PT Cells in PDX.svg")
Figure18
dev.off()
```

```{r Clustering BM cells}
resList <- list()
for (res in seq(0.01, 1.0, by = 0.01)) {
  #Find neighbors and clusters
  onlyBM <- FindNeighbors(onlyBM, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
  onlyBM <- FindClusters(onlyBM, resolution = res)
  
  #Count number of clusters
  clustnbr <- length(unique(onlyBM$seurat_clusters))
  
  #Add number of clusters to list
  resList[[as.character(res)]] <- clustnbr
}

#Ggplot of changes in cluster number with different resolutions
resDF <- data.frame(Resolution = as.numeric(names(resList)), ClusterNumber = unlist(resList))
ggplot(resDF, aes(x = Resolution, y = ClusterNumber)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  ggtitle("Number of Clusters at Different Resolutions") +
  xlab("Resolution") +
  ylab("Number of Clusters") +
  theme_minimal()

#13 cluster at res 0.15 seem to be a good choice
onlyBM <- FindNeighbors(onlyBM, reduction = "integrated.harmony", dims = 1:30)
onlyBM <- FindClusters(onlyBM, resolution = 0.30)

#Planar ut vid 2, 5, 9, 14 kluster. 9 Känns rimlig, res = 30.

#Setting cluster names 1-13
new.cluster.ids <- c(1:13) 
names(new.cluster.ids) <- levels(onlyBM)
onlyBM <- RenameIdents(onlyBM, new.cluster.ids)
onlyBM$seurat_clusters <- Idents(onlyBM)

UMAPBMClust <- DimPlot(onlyBM, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters", cols = Cluster_colours)+ ggtitle("UMAP of BM cells clustered") + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1)) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")
DimPlot(onlyBM, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "seurat_clusters", split.by = "Cell_Line_n")

saveplots(UMAPBMClust, "../BM Publication/", "UMAP BM by cluster", w = 1050)
svg("UMAP BM by cluster.svg")
UMAPBMClust
dev.off()
UMAPBMClust

VlnBMBMA <- VlnPlot(onlyBM, features = c("BM-Ascore1"), group.by = "seurat_clusters", pt.size = 0, sort = "increasing", cols = Cluster_colours) + geom_boxplot(fill = "white", alpha = 0.5, width = 0.5,outliers = F) +
stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2, fill = "white", color = "black") + 
ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova", label.y = max(onlyBM@meta.data$`BM-Ascore1`, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95)
VlnBMBMB <- VlnPlot(onlyBM, features = c("BM-Bscore1"), group.by = "seurat_clusters", pt.size = 0, sort = "increasing", cols = Cluster_colours) + geom_boxplot(fill = "white", alpha = 0.5, width = 0.5,outliers = F) + stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2, fill = "white", color = "black") + 
ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova", label.y = max(onlyBM@meta.data$`BM-Bscore1`, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95)
VlnBMBMdiff <- VlnPlot(onlyBM, features = c("BMdiff"), group.by = "seurat_clusters", pt.size = 0, sort = "increasing", cols = Cluster_colours) + geom_boxplot(fill = "white", alpha = 0.5, width = 0.5,outliers = F) + stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 2, fill = "white", color = "black") + ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova", label.y = max(onlyBM@meta.data$BMdiff, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95)

VlnBM <- wrap_plots(VlnBMBMA, VlnBMBMB, VlnBMBMdiff, ncol = 3)

saveplots(VlnBM, "../BM Publication/", "Vlnplot BM scores by cluster", w = 2500)
svg("Vlnplot BM scores by cluster.svg", width = 15, height = 6)
VlnBM
dev.off()
VlnBM

#Adding BM-A/B identity to BM cells from cluster belonging
onlyBM$type <- ifelse(onlyBM$seurat_clusters == 1, "BM-A", ifelse(onlyBM$seurat_clusters %in% c(6, 8), "BM-B", "Other"))

#Plotting BM-A/B scores in BM cells (Dimplot and Barplot)
UMAPBMtype <- DimPlot(onlyBM, reduction = "umap.harmony", group.by = "type", cols = c("BM-A" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B" = "#990000", "Other" = "lightgrey"), pt.size = 0.8) + ggtitle("UMAP of BM cells") + theme(axis.line = element_line(color = "black"), axis.title = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"), axis.ticks = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", size = 1)) + ylab("UMAP_2") + xlab("UMAP_1")

saveplots(UMAPBMtype, "../BM Publication/", "UMAP BM by BM-A BM-B", w = 1050)
svg("UMAP BM by BM-A BM-B.svg")
UMAPBMtype
dev.off()
UMAPBMtype

cellLine <- c(rep(c("LU-NB-1_BM", "LU-NB-2_BM", "LU-NB-3_BM"), each = 2))
type <- c(rep(c("BM-A", "BM-B"), times = 3))
percentage <- c(c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-A" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-B" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-1")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-A" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-B" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-2")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-A" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3")))), c(length(WhichCells(onlyBM, expression = type == "BM-B" & Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3"))/length(colnames(subset(onlyBM, Cell_Line_n == "LU-NB-3")))))
barplotData5 <- data.frame(cellLine, type, percentage)
BarplotBM2 <- ggplot(barplotData5, aes(fill=type, y=percentage, x=cellLine, size=8)) + 
  geom_bar(position = "dodge", stat = "identity", width = 0.9) + 
  ggtitle("Percentage of BM-A/BM-B Cells") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("BM-A" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B" = "#990000")) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("LU-NB-1_BM", "LU-NB-2_BM", "LU-NB-3_BM"), labels = c("LU-NB-1", "LU-NB-2", "LU-NB-3")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 0.50, by = 0.1), labels = scales::label_percent(), expand = expansion(0, c(0, 0.05))) +
  geom_text(aes(label = 100*round(percentage, 4)), 
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.8, color =  "black", size = 3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, hjust = 0.5, colour = c(PDX_colours[1], PDX_colours[2], PDX_colours[3])),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
  text = element_text(size = 12, color = "black"))

BarplotBM2

saveplots(BarplotBM2, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot BM type in BM by cluster")
svg("Barplot BM type in BM by cluster.svg")
BarplotBM2
dev.off()

```

```{r short preparation for MAST}
onlyBMAB <- subset(onlyBM, type %in% c("BM-A", "BM-B"))

#Factoring grouping factors and removing empty levels
PTCells@meta.data <- droplevels(PTCells@meta.data)
PTCells$Cell_Line_n <- as.factor(PTCells$Cell_Line_n)
PTCells$Mouse_n <- as.factor(PTCells$Mouse_n)
onlyBM@meta.data <- droplevels(onlyBM@meta.data)
onlyBM$Cell_Line_n <- as.factor(onlyBM$Cell_Line_n)
onlyBM$Mouse_n <- as.factor(onlyBM$Mouse_n)
onlyBMAB@meta.data <- droplevels(onlyBMAB@meta.data)
onlyBMAB$Cell_Line_n <- as.factor(onlyBMAB$Cell_Line_n)
onlyBMAB$Mouse_n <- as.factor(onlyBMAB$Mouse_n)

PTCells$A_vs_rest <- ifelse(PTCells$BMLike == "BM-A Like", "BM-A Like", "Rest")
PTCells$B_vs_rest <- ifelse(PTCells$BMLike == "BM-B Like", "BM-B Like", "Rest")
PTCells$A_vs_rest <- as.factor(PTCells$A_vs_rest)
PTCells$B_vs_rest <- as.factor(PTCells$B_vs_rest)

onlyBM$A_vs_rest <- ifelse(onlyBM$type == "BM-A", "BM-A", "Rest")
onlyBM$B_vs_rest <- ifelse(onlyBM$type == "BM-B", "BM-B", "Rest")
onlyBM$Other_vs_AB <- ifelse(onlyBM$type == "Other", "Other", "BM-AB")
onlyBM$A_vs_rest <- as.factor(onlyBM$A_vs_rest)
onlyBM$B_vs_rest <- as.factor(onlyBM$B_vs_rest)
onlyBM$Other_vs_AB <- as.factor(onlyBM$Other_vs_AB)

onlyBMAB$A_vs_B <- ifelse(onlyBMAB$type == "BM-A", "BM-A", "BM-B")
onlyBMAB$A_vs_B <- as.factor(onlyBMAB$A_vs_B)

```


```{r MAST Between BM-A Like/BM-B Like PT cells (BM-A Like to non, BM-B like to none)}
  Idents(PTCells) <- "A_vs_rest"
# View percentage of cells expressing Genes
  PctExpressing_BMALike <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = PTCells, idents = "BM-A Like"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(A_vs_rest = "BM-A Like")
  PctExpressing_BMOther <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = PTCells, idents = "Rest"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(A_vs_rest = "Rest")
# Rename columns
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMALike) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","A_vs_rest")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMOther) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","A_vs_rest")

# Bind
  PctExpressing <- rbind(PctExpressing_BMALike, PctExpressing_BMOther) %>% arrange(Gene)

# Create gene selection vector
  passing_genes <- unique(PctExpressing$Gene[PctExpressing$Percentage_Expressing >= 0.05])
  Percent_gene_selection_vector <- rownames(PTCells) %in% passing_genes
  names(Percent_gene_selection_vector) <- rownames(PTCells) 

#Preparing MAST
  Integrated_logTPM <- GetAssayData(PTCells, assay = "RNA", layer = "data") 
  Integrated_logTPM_Subset <- Integrated_logTPM[Percent_gene_selection_vector,]
# Create the feature data (gene information)
  gene_metadata <- data.frame(primerid  = rownames(Integrated_logTPM_Subset))
# Extract cell metadata from the Seurat object
  cell_metadata <- PTCells@meta.data
# Add a unique identifier column for each cell (well key)
  cell_metadata$wellKey <- rownames(cell_metadata)
# Create a SingleCellAssay object using MAST::FromMatrix
  sca_object <- MAST::FromMatrix(
      exprsArray = as.matrix(Integrated_logTPM_Subset),  
      cData = cell_metadata, 
      fData = gene_metadata,
      check_sanity = TRUE 
  )
# Remove unnecessary R objects
  rm(list = c("Integrated_logTPM","Integrated_logTPM_Subset"))
  
#Running MAST
random_zlm_fit <- MAST::zlm(formula = ~ 1 + A_vs_rest + nFeature_RNA + (1 | Cell_Line_n/Mouse_n),
                                  sca_object, method = "glmer", ebayes = FALSE,parallel = TRUE)
#Changing and removing Cell_Line_n/Mouse_n due to errors ( Error : grouping factors must have > 1 sampled level and fixed-effect model matrix is rank deficient so dropping 1 column / coefficient). As Cell_Line_n only has 1 mouse after subsetting to PT only. And I think because type/BMLike was very correlated to Cell_Line_n

#Processing
  random_zlm_summaryA <- MAST::summary(random_zlm_fit, doLRT = "A_vs_restBM-A Like")
  random_summary_dataA <- random_zlm_summaryA$datatable
# Filter and merge the summary data for logFC and Hurdle components
  random_logFC_dataA <- random_summary_dataA[random_summary_dataA$contrast == "A_vs_restBM-A Like" & random_summary_dataA$component == "logFC", 
                                 c(1,7,5,6,8)]
  random_hurdle_dataA <- random_summary_dataA[random_summary_dataA$contrast == "A_vs_restBM-A Like" & random_summary_dataA$component == "H", 
                                  c(1,4)]
# Merge logFC and Hurdle results
  mast_random_hurdle_resultsA <- merge(random_logFC_dataA, random_hurdle_dataA, by = "primerid")
# Remove any rows with missing data
  mast_analysis_resultsA <- stats::na.omit(as.data.frame(mast_random_hurdle_resultsA))
# Organise in descending order and add Qvalue
  mast_analysis_resultsA <- mast_analysis_resultsA %>% 
    mutate(qvalue = qvalue(mast_analysis_resultsA$`Pr(>Chisq)`)$qvalues) %>% 
    arrange(desc(coef))
  
saveRDS(mast_analysis_resultsA, "../BM Publication/MAST_BMALikevsOther.rds")
```

```{r MAST BM-B like against rest}
#Same for BM-B Like vs Other
  Idents(PTCells) <- "B_vs_rest"
  PctExpressing_BMBLike <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = PTCells, idents = "BM-B Like"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(B_vs_rest = "BM-B Like")
  PctExpressing_BMOther <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = PTCells, idents = "Rest"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(B_vs_rest = "Rest")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMBLike) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","B_vs_rest")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMOther) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","B_vs_rest")
  PctExpressing <- rbind(PctExpressing_BMBLike, PctExpressing_BMOther) %>% arrange(Gene)
  passing_genes <- unique(PctExpressing$Gene[PctExpressing$Percentage_Expressing >= 0.05])
  Percent_gene_selection_vector <- rownames(PTCells) %in% passing_genes
  names(Percent_gene_selection_vector) <- rownames(PTCells) 
  Integrated_logTPM <- GetAssayData(PTCells, assay = "RNA", layer = "data") 
  Integrated_logTPM_Subset <- Integrated_logTPM[Percent_gene_selection_vector,]
  gene_metadata <- data.frame(primerid  = rownames(Integrated_logTPM_Subset))
  cell_metadata <- PTCells@meta.data
  cell_metadata$wellKey <- rownames(cell_metadata)

  sca_object <- MAST::FromMatrix(
      exprsArray = as.matrix(Integrated_logTPM_Subset),  
      cData = cell_metadata, 
      fData = gene_metadata,
      check_sanity = TRUE 
  )
  
  rm(list = c("Integrated_logTPM","Integrated_logTPM_Subset"))
  
random_zlm_fit <- MAST::zlm(formula = ~ 1 + B_vs_rest + nFeature_RNA + (1 | Cell_Line_n/Mouse_n),
                                  sca_object, method = "glmer", ebayes = FALSE,parallel = TRUE)

  random_zlm_summaryB <- MAST::summary(random_zlm_fit, doLRT = "B_vs_restBM-B Like")
  random_summary_dataB <- random_zlm_summaryB$datatable
  random_logFC_dataB <- random_summary_dataB[random_summary_dataB$contrast == "B_vs_restBM-B Like" & random_summary_dataB$component == "logFC", 
                                 c(1,7,5,6,8)]
  random_hurdle_dataB <- random_summary_dataB[random_summary_dataB$contrast == "B_vs_restBM-B Like" & random_summary_dataB$component == "H", 
                                  c(1,4)]
  mast_random_hurdle_resultsB <- merge(random_logFC_dataB, random_hurdle_dataB, by = "primerid")
  mast_analysis_resultsB <- stats::na.omit(as.data.frame(mast_random_hurdle_resultsB))
  mast_analysis_resultsB <- mast_analysis_resultsB %>% 
    mutate(qvalue = qvalue(mast_analysis_resultsB$`Pr(>Chisq)`)$qvalues) %>% 
    arrange(desc(coef))

saveRDS(mast_analysis_resultsB, "../BM Publication/MAST_BMBLikevsOther.rds")

# Q: Explain the code for the Mast analysis in detail, including the rationale for each step and how the data is being processed
# A: The code is performing a differential expression analysis using the MAST package to compare gene expression between BM-A Like and Other PT cells. The steps are as follows:
# 1. The code first sets the identities of the PTCells object to "BMLike", which categorizes the cells into BM-A Like, BM-B Like, and Other based on their scores.
# 2. It procedes to calculate the percentage of cells expressing each gene in the BM-A Like, BM-B Like, and Other groups. This is done by checking how many cells have non-zero counts for each gene and dividing by the total number of cells in that group.
# 3. Then it creates a selection vector for genes that are expressed in at least 5% of the cells in any of the groups. This is a common step to filter out genes that are not expressed in enough cells to be informative.
# 4. The code then subsets the log-transformed TPM data to include only the genes
# 5. Next, it creates a SingleCellAssay object using the MAST::FromMatrix function, which takes the expression data, cell metadata, and gene metadata. This object is required for running the MAST analysis.
# 6. The code then fits a linear mixed model using MAST::zlm, with the formula specifying that gene expression is modeled as a function of the BMLike group, the number of features (nFeature_RNA), and random effects for Cell_Line_n and Mouse_n. The method "glmer" indicates that it is using a generalized linear mixed model, and ebayes = FALSE means that it will not use empirical Bayes shrinkage.
# 7. After fitting the model, it summarizes the results using MAST::summary, specifying that it wants to perform a likelihood ratio test comparing BM-A Like to Other.. 
# 8. The summary results are then processed to extract the log fold change and p-values for the comparison of interest, and these are merged into a single data frame.
# 9. Finally, the results are cleaned up by removing any rows with missing data, and a q-value is calculated for multiple testing correction. The results are then arranged in descending order of the coefficient (log fold change) and saved as an RDS file for later use.
# Q: Why is it testing BM-A Like against others, how can it test BM-A Like against BM-B Like. Or BM-A Like to both BM-B Like and Other? 
# A: The code is currently set up to test BM-A Like against Other, which includes all cells that are not classified as BM-A Like. If you want to test BM-A Like against BM-B Like specifically, you would need to change the contrast in the MAST::summary function to "BMLikeBM-B Like". If you want to compare BM-A Like to both BM-B Like and Other, you would need to set up a different contrast that compares BM-A Like to the combined group of BM-B Like and Other, which might require creating a new variable in the metadata that groups BM-B Like and Other together before running the MAST analysis.
```

```{r Volcanoplots MAST results in PT}
#VolcPlot of results BM-A Like
mastResultsADF <- data.frame(Gene = mast_analysis_resultsA$primerid, Log2FC = mast_analysis_resultsA$coef, AdjPValue = mast_analysis_resultsA$`Pr(>Chisq)`, Significant = ifelse(mast_analysis_resultsA$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_analysis_resultsA$coef > 0.25, "Upregulated", ifelse(mast_analysis_resultsA$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_analysis_resultsA$coef < -0.25, "Downregulated", "Not Significant")))

top_genes <- mastResultsADF %>%
  filter(Log2FC > 0.25 | Log2FC < -0.25) %>%
  arrange(AdjPValue) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1:40)

VolcanoplotMastA <- ggplot(mastResultsADF, aes(x = Log2FC, y = -log10(AdjPValue), color = Significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1000, by = 100), expand = expansion(0, c(0, 100))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Downregulated" = "#6BAED6", #"#00AFBB"
                                "Not significant" = "grey",
                                "Upregulated" = "#FF7F7F")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.25, 0.25), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_genes, aes(label = Gene), size = 2, max.overlaps = 20) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "BM-A like PT cells against Not BM Like: Differentially Expressed Genes",
       x = "Average ln Fold Change",
       y = "-log10 P-value")

saveplots(VolcanoplotMastA, "../BM Publication/", "Volcanoplot Mast results BM-A Like")
svg("Volcanoplot Mast results BM-A Like.svg")
VolcanoplotMastA
dev.off()
VolcanoplotMastA

#Volcplot of results from BM-B Like
#VolcPlot of results BM-A Like
mastResultsBDF <- data.frame(Gene = mast_analysis_resultsB$primerid, Log2FC = mast_analysis_resultsB$coef, AdjPValue = mast_analysis_resultsB$`Pr(>Chisq)`, Significant = ifelse(mast_analysis_resultsB$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_analysis_resultsB$coef > 0.25, "Upregulated", ifelse(mast_analysis_resultsB$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_analysis_resultsB$coef < -0.25, "Downregulated", "Not Significant")))

top_genes <- mastResultsBDF %>%
  filter(Log2FC > 0.25 | Log2FC < -0.25) %>%
  arrange(AdjPValue) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1:40)

VolcanoplotMastB <- ggplot(mastResultsBDF, aes(x = Log2FC, y = -log10(AdjPValue), color = Significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1000, by = 100), expand = expansion(0, c(0, 100))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Downregulated" = "#6BAED6", #"#00AFBB"
                                "Not significant" = "grey",
                                "Upregulated" = "#990000")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.25, 0.25), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_genes, aes(label = Gene), size = 2, max.overlaps = 20) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "BM-B like PT cells against Not BM Like: Differentially Expressed Genes",
       x = "Average ln Fold Change",
       y = "-log10 P-value")

saveplots(VolcanoplotMastB, "../BM Publication/", "Volcanoplot Mast results BM-B Like")
svg("Volcanoplot Mast results BM-B Like.svg")
VolcanoplotMastB
dev.off()
VolcanoplotMastB
```

```{r Plotting Mast results in PT}
#Cutoff for selecting DEG BM-A Like
hist(mast_analysis_resultsA$`Pr(>Chisq)`)
UpGenesMastBMALike <- mast_analysis_resultsA$primerid[which(mast_analysis_resultsA$coef > 0.25 & mast_analysis_resultsA$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_analysis_resultsA$qvalue < 0.05)]
DownGenesMastBMALike <- mast_analysis_resultsA$primerid[which(mast_analysis_resultsA$coef < 0.25 & mast_analysis_resultsA$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_analysis_resultsA$qvalue < 0.05)]
SignGenesMastBMALike <- c(UpGenesMastBMALike, DownGenesMastBMALike)
#Cutoff for selecting DEG BM-B Like
hist(mast_analysis_resultsB$`Pr(>Chisq)`)
UpGenesMastBMBLike <- mast_analysis_resultsB$primerid[which(mast_analysis_resultsB$coef > 0.25 & mast_analysis_resultsB$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_analysis_resultsB$qvalue < 0.05)]
DownGenesMastBMBLike <- mast_analysis_resultsB$primerid[which(mast_analysis_resultsB$coef < 0.25 & mast_analysis_resultsB$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_analysis_resultsB$qvalue < 0.05)]
SignGenesMastBMBLike <- c(UpGenesMastBMBLike, DownGenesMastBMBLike)

#Dotplot of results
DotplotBMA <- DotPlot(PTCells, features = UpGenesMastBMALike, group.by = "BMLike") + RotatedAxis()
DotplotBMB <- DotPlot(PTCells, features = UpGenesMastBMBLike, group.by = "BMLike") + RotatedAxis()
DotPlot(PTCells, features = SignGenesMastBMALike, group.by = "BMLike") + RotatedAxis()
DotPlot(PTCells, features = SignGenesMastBMBLike, group.by = "BMLike") + RotatedAxis()

saveplots(DotplotBMA, "../BM Publication/", "Dotplot BM-A Like DEG", w = 3000)
svg("Dotplot BM-A Like DEG.svg", width = 20)
DotplotBMA
dev.off()
saveplots(DotplotBMB, "../BM Publication/", "Dotplot BM-B Like DEG", w = 3000)
svg("Dotplot BM-B Like DEG.svg", width = 20)
DotplotBMB
dev.off()
```

```{r Heatmap BM-Like DEG}
#Heatmap of results (top 25 up and down genes for both comparisons in one heatmap, columns clustered, annotated for PDX)
HeatmapGeneList <- c(UpGenesMastBMALike[1:25], DownGenesMastBMALike[1:25], UpGenesMastBMBLike[1:25], DownGenesMastBMBLike[1:25])

HeatmapMatr <- GetAssayData(PTCells, assay = "SCT", layer = "scale.data")
HeatmapMatr <- HeatmapMatr[order(factor(rownames(HeatmapMatr), levels = HeatmapGeneList)), ]

HeatmapAnnotations <- HeatmapAnnotation(PDX = PTCells$Cell_Line_n, Profile = PTCells$BMLike, col = list(PDX = PDX_colours, Profile = c("BM-A Like" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B Like" = "#990000", "Other" = "lightgrey")), annotation_label = c("PDX", "Profile"), show_legend = FALSE)
HeatmapAnnotationRow <- rowAnnotation(Signature = ifelse(rownames(HeatmapMatr) %in% UpGenesMastBMALike, "BM-A Like Up DEG", ifelse(rownames(HeatmapMatr) %in% DownGenesMastBMALike, "BM-A Like Down DEG", ifelse(rownames(HeatmapMatr) %in% UpGenesMastBMBLike, "BM-B Like Up DEG", "BM-B Like Down DEG"))), show_legend = FALSE, col = list(Signature = c("BM-A Like Up DEG" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B Like Up DEG" = "#990000", "BM-A Like Down DEG" = "#90D5FF", "BM-B Like Down DEG" = "#104581")), annotation_label = c(" "))

HMPT <- Heatmap(HeatmapMatr, name = "Heatmap", cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = TRUE, show_column_dend = TRUE, show_column_names = FALSE, show_row_dend = FALSE, top_annotation = HeatmapAnnotations, rigth_annotation = HeatmapAnnotationRow, col = col_fun, use_raster = FALSE, column_title = "Heatmap BM-Like DE genes", show_heatmap_legend = FALSE, row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6))

#Lgnds
matrixLGND <- Legend(col_fun = col_fun, title = "Expression")
cellLineLGND <- Legend(labels = c("LU-NB-1", "LU-NB-2", "LU-NB-3"), title = "PDX", legend_gp = gpar(fill = PDX_colours))
typeLGND <- Legend(labels = c("BM-A Like", "BM-B Like", "Other"), title = "Profile", legend_gp = gpar(fill = c("BM-A Like" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B Like" = "#990000", "Other" = "lightgrey")))
GeneSignLGND <- Legend(labels = c("BM-A Like Up DEG", "BM-B Like Up DEG", "BM-A Like Down DEG", "BM-B Like Down DEG"), title = "Gene signature", legend_gp = gpar(fill = c("BM-A Like Up DEG" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B Like Up DEG" = "#990000", "BM-A Like Down DEG" = "#90D5FF", "BM-B Like Down DEG" = "#104581")))
LGNDs3 <- packLegend(matrixLGND, cellLineLGND, typeLGND, GeneSignLGND)

HeatmapBMLikeDEG <- draw(HMPT, annotation_legend_list = LGNDs3)

png("Heatmap BM Like DEG.png", width = 3000, height = 3500, res = 300)
HeatmapBMLikeDEG
dev.off()
svg("Heatmap BM Like DEG.svg", width = 15, height = 10)
HeatmapBMLikeDEG
dev.off()
```

```{r GSEA from BM-A Like DE}
#Skapa lista med fold-change
gseaGeneList <- mast_analysis_resultsA$coef
names(gseaGeneList) <- mast_analysis_resultsA$primerid
GeneNameDF <- bitr(names(gseaGeneList), fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db) #översätter till entrez

gseaGeneList <- gseaGeneList[GeneNameDF$SYMBOL]
names(gseaGeneList) <- GeneNameDF$ENTREZID
gseaGeneList <- sort(gseaGeneList, decreasing = TRUE)

#Running GSEA
KEGGResult <- gseKEGG(geneList = gseaGeneList, organism = "hsa", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- gseGO(geneList = gseaGeneList, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- simplify(GOResult, cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min, measure = "Wang")

#Preparing/setting order
DFKEGGResult <- KEGGResult@result
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[DFKEGGResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFKEGGResult <- head(DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(-DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
UpKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES > 0]
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
DownKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownKegg, UpKegg)
DFKEGGResult$Description <- factor(DFKEGGResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All KEGG
KEGGBMALikeAll <- ggplot(DFKEGGResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

#Preparing/setting order
DFGOResult <- GOResult@result
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[DFGOResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFGOResult <- head(DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(-DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
UpGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES > 0]
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
DownGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownGO, UpGO)
DFGOResult$Description <- factor(DFGOResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All GO
GOBMALikeAll <- ggplot(DFGOResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMALikeAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG BM-A Like", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG BM-A Like.svg", width = 20)
KEGGBMALikeAll
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMALikeAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO BM-A Like", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO BM-A Like.svg", width = 20)
GOBMALikeAll
dev.off()

#Selecting top 10
DFKEGG10 <- rbind(head(DFKEGGResult, n = 10), tail(DFKEGGResult, n = 10))
DFGO10 <- rbind(head(DFGOResult, n = 10), tail(DFGOResult, n = 10))

#Plotting top 10
KEGGBMALike10 <- ggplot(DFKEGG10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
GOBMALike10 <- ggplot(DFGO10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMALike10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 BM-A Like")
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 BM-A Like.svg")
KEGGBMALike10
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMALike10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO top10 BM-A Like", w = 1100)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO top10 BM-A Like.svg")
GOBMALike10
dev.off()
```

```{r GSEA from BM-B Like DE}
#Skapa lista med fold-change
gseaGeneList <- mast_analysis_resultsB$coef
names(gseaGeneList) <- mast_analysis_resultsB$primerid
GeneNameDF <- bitr(names(gseaGeneList), fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db) #översätter till entrez

gseaGeneList <- gseaGeneList[GeneNameDF$SYMBOL]
names(gseaGeneList) <- GeneNameDF$ENTREZID
gseaGeneList <- sort(gseaGeneList, decreasing = TRUE)

#Running GSEA
KEGGResult <- gseKEGG(geneList = gseaGeneList, organism = "hsa", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- gseGO(geneList = gseaGeneList, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- simplify(GOResult, cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min, measure = "Wang")

#Preparing/setting order
DFKEGGResult <- KEGGResult@result
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[DFKEGGResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFKEGGResult <- head(DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(-DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
UpKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES > 0]
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
DownKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownKegg, UpKegg)
DFKEGGResult$Description <- factor(DFKEGGResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All KEGG
KEGGBMBLikeAll <- ggplot(DFKEGGResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

#Preparing/setting order
DFGOResult <- GOResult@result
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[DFGOResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFGOResult <- head(DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(-DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
UpGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES > 0]
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
DownGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownGO, UpGO)
DFGOResult$Description <- factor(DFGOResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All GO
GOBMBLikeAll <- ggplot(DFGOResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMBLikeAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG BM-B Like", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG BM-B Like.svg", width = 20)
KEGGBMBLikeAll
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMBLikeAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO BM-B Like", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO BM-B Like.svg", width = 20)
GOBMBLikeAll
dev.off()

#Selecting top 10
DFKEGG10 <- rbind(head(DFKEGGResult, n = 10), tail(DFKEGGResult, n = 10))
DFGO10 <- rbind(head(DFGOResult, n = 10), tail(DFGOResult, n = 10))

#Plotting top 10
KEGGBMBLike10 <- ggplot(DFKEGG10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
GOBMBLike10 <- ggplot(DFGO10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMBLike10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 BM-B Like")
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 BM-B Like.svg")
KEGGBMBLike10
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMBLike10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO top10 BM-B Like", w = 1100)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO top10 BM-B Like.svg")
GOBMBLike10
dev.off()
```


```{r MAST Between BM-A/BM-B BM cells (BM-A to BM-B), BM-A to all other, BM-B to all other and finaly other to BM-A and BM-B}
#MAST BM-A to BM-B
  Idents(onlyBMAB) <- "A_vs_B"
  PctExpressing_BMA <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = onlyBMAB, idents = "BM-A"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(type = "BM-A")
  PctExpressing_BMB <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = onlyBMAB, idents = "BM-B"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(type = "BM-B")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMA) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","A_vs_B")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMB) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","A_vs_B")
  PctExpressing <- rbind(PctExpressing_BMA,PctExpressing_BMB) %>% arrange(Gene)
  passing_genes <- unique(PctExpressing$Gene[PctExpressing$Percentage_Expressing >= 0.05])
  Percent_gene_selection_vector <- rownames(onlyBMAB) %in% passing_genes
  names(Percent_gene_selection_vector) <- rownames(onlyBMAB) 
  Integrated_logTPM <- GetAssayData(onlyBMAB, assay = "RNA", layer = "data") 
  Integrated_logTPM_Subset <- Integrated_logTPM[Percent_gene_selection_vector,]
  gene_metadata <- data.frame(primerid  = rownames(Integrated_logTPM_Subset))
  cell_metadata <- onlyBMAB@meta.data
  cell_metadata$wellKey <- rownames(cell_metadata)

    sca_object <- MAST::FromMatrix(
      exprsArray = as.matrix(Integrated_logTPM_Subset),  
      cData = cell_metadata, 
      fData = gene_metadata,
      check_sanity = TRUE 
  )

  rm(list = c("Integrated_logTPM","Integrated_logTPM_Subset"))

random_zlm_fit <- MAST::zlm(formula = ~ 1 + A_vs_B + nFeature_RNA + (1 | Cell_Line_n/Mouse_n),
                                  sca_object, method = "glmer", ebayes = FALSE,parallel = TRUE)

  random_zlm_summaryBM <- MAST::summary(random_zlm_fit, doLRT = "A_vs_BBM-A")
  random_summary_dataBM <- random_zlm_summaryBM$datatable
  random_logFC_dataBM <- random_summary_dataBM[random_summary_dataBM$contrast == "A_vs_BBM-A" & random_summary_dataBM$component == "logFC", 
                                 c(1,7,5,6,8)]
  random_hurdle_dataBM <- random_summary_dataBM[random_summary_dataBM$contrast == "A_vs_BBM-A" & random_summary_dataBM$component == "H", 
                                  c(1,4)]
  mast_random_hurdle_resultsBM <- merge(random_logFC_dataBM, random_hurdle_dataBM, by = "primerid")
  mast_random_analysis_resultsBM <- stats::na.omit(as.data.frame(mast_random_hurdle_resultsBM))
  mast_random_analysis_resultsBM <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBM %>% 
    mutate(qvalue = qvalue(mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$`Pr(>Chisq)`)$qvalues) %>% 
    arrange(desc(coef))
  
saveRDS(mast_random_analysis_resultsBM, "../BM Publication/MAST_BMAvsBMB.rds")
```

```{r MAST BM-A to all other}
#Same for BM-B Like vs Other
  Idents(onlyBM) <- "A_vs_rest"
  PctExpressing_BMA <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = onlyBM, idents = "BM-A"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(A_vs_rest = "BM-A")
  PctExpressing_BMOther <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = onlyBM, idents = "Rest"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(A_vs_rest = "Rest")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMA) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","A_vs_rest")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMOther) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","A_vs_rest")
  PctExpressing <- rbind(PctExpressing_BMA, PctExpressing_BMOther) %>% arrange(Gene)
  passing_genes <- unique(PctExpressing$Gene[PctExpressing$Percentage_Expressing >= 0.05])
  Percent_gene_selection_vector <- rownames(onlyBM) %in% passing_genes
  names(Percent_gene_selection_vector) <- rownames(onlyBM) 
  Integrated_logTPM <- GetAssayData(onlyBM, assay = "RNA", layer = "data") 
  Integrated_logTPM_Subset <- Integrated_logTPM[Percent_gene_selection_vector,]
  gene_metadata <- data.frame(primerid  = rownames(Integrated_logTPM_Subset))
  cell_metadata <- onlyBM@meta.data
  cell_metadata$wellKey <- rownames(cell_metadata)

  sca_object <- MAST::FromMatrix(
      exprsArray = as.matrix(Integrated_logTPM_Subset),  
      cData = cell_metadata, 
      fData = gene_metadata,
      check_sanity = TRUE 
  )
  
  rm(list = c("Integrated_logTPM","Integrated_logTPM_Subset"))
  
random_zlm_fit <- MAST::zlm(formula = ~ 1 + A_vs_rest + nFeature_RNA + (1 | Cell_Line_n/Mouse_n),
                                  sca_object, method = "glmer", ebayes = FALSE,parallel = TRUE)

  random_zlm_summaryBMA <- MAST::summary(random_zlm_fit, doLRT = "A_vs_restBM-A")
  random_summary_dataBMA <- random_zlm_summaryBMA$datatable
  random_logFC_dataBMA <- random_summary_dataBMA[random_summary_dataBMA$contrast == "A_vs_restBM-A" & random_summary_dataBMA$component == "logFC", 
                                 c(1,7,5,6,8)]
  random_hurdle_dataBMA <- random_summary_dataBMA[random_summary_dataBMA$contrast == "A_vs_restBM-A" & random_summary_dataBMA$component == "H", 
                                  c(1,4)]
  mast_random_hurdle_resultsBMA <- merge(random_logFC_dataBMA, random_hurdle_dataBMA, by = "primerid")
  mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA <- stats::na.omit(as.data.frame(mast_random_hurdle_resultsBMA))
  mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA %>% 
    mutate(qvalue = qvalue(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$`Pr(>Chisq)`)$qvalues) %>% 
    arrange(desc(coef))
  
saveRDS(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA, "../BM Publication/MAST_BMA.rds")
```

```{r MAST BM-B to all other}
#Same for BM-B Like vs Other
  Idents(onlyBM) <- "B_vs_rest"
  PctExpressing_BMB <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = onlyBM, idents = "BM-B"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(B_vs_rest = "BM-B")
  PctExpressing_BMOther <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = onlyBM, idents = "Rest"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(B_vs_rest = "Rest")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMB) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","B_vs_rest")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMOther) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","B_vs_rest")
  PctExpressing <- rbind(PctExpressing_BMA, PctExpressing_BMOther) %>% arrange(Gene)
  passing_genes <- unique(PctExpressing$Gene[PctExpressing$Percentage_Expressing >= 0.05])
  Percent_gene_selection_vector <- rownames(onlyBM) %in% passing_genes
  names(Percent_gene_selection_vector) <- rownames(onlyBM) 
  Integrated_logTPM <- GetAssayData(onlyBM, assay = "RNA", layer = "data") 
  Integrated_logTPM_Subset <- Integrated_logTPM[Percent_gene_selection_vector,]
  gene_metadata <- data.frame(primerid  = rownames(Integrated_logTPM_Subset))
  cell_metadata <- onlyBM@meta.data
  cell_metadata$wellKey <- rownames(cell_metadata)

  sca_object <- MAST::FromMatrix(
      exprsArray = as.matrix(Integrated_logTPM_Subset),  
      cData = cell_metadata, 
      fData = gene_metadata,
      check_sanity = TRUE 
  )
  
  rm(list = c("Integrated_logTPM","Integrated_logTPM_Subset"))
  
random_zlm_fit <- MAST::zlm(formula = ~ 1 + B_vs_rest + nFeature_RNA + (1 | Cell_Line_n/Mouse_n),
                                  sca_object, method = "glmer", ebayes = FALSE,parallel = TRUE)

  random_zlm_summaryBMB <- MAST::summary(random_zlm_fit, doLRT = "B_vs_restBM-B")
  random_summary_dataBMB <- random_zlm_summaryBMB$datatable
  random_logFC_dataBMB <- random_summary_dataBMB[random_summary_dataBMB$contrast == "B_vs_restBM-B" & random_summary_dataBMB$component == "logFC", 
                                 c(1,7,5,6,8)]
  random_hurdle_dataBMB <- random_summary_dataBMB[random_summary_dataBMB$contrast == "B_vs_restBM-B" & random_summary_dataBMB$component == "H", 
                                  c(1,4)]
  mast_random_hurdle_resultsBMB <- merge(random_logFC_dataBMB, random_hurdle_dataBMB, by = "primerid")
  mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB <- stats::na.omit(as.data.frame(mast_random_hurdle_resultsBMB))
  mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB %>% 
    mutate(qvalue = qvalue(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$`Pr(>Chisq)`)$qvalues) %>% 
    arrange(desc(coef))
  
saveRDS(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB, "../BM Publication/MAST_BMB.rds")
```

```{r MAST other to BM-AB}
#Same for BM-B Like vs Other
  Idents(onlyBM) <- "Other_vs_AB"
  PctExpressing_BMOther <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = onlyBM, idents = "Other"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(Other_vs_AB = "Other")
  PctExpressing_BMAB <- data.frame(rowMeans(GetAssayData(subset(x = onlyBM, idents = "BM-AB"),assay = "RNA",slot = "counts") != 0) ) %>% 
    tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Gene") %>% mutate(Other_vs_AB = "BM-AB")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMOther) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","Other_vs_AB")
  colnames(PctExpressing_BMAB) <- c("Gene","Percentage_Expressing","Other_vs_AB")
  PctExpressing <- rbind(PctExpressing_BMOther, PctExpressing_BMAB) %>% arrange(Gene)
  passing_genes <- unique(PctExpressing$Gene[PctExpressing$Percentage_Expressing >= 0.05])
  Percent_gene_selection_vector <- rownames(onlyBM) %in% passing_genes
  names(Percent_gene_selection_vector) <- rownames(onlyBM) 
  Integrated_logTPM <- GetAssayData(onlyBM, assay = "RNA", layer = "data") 
  Integrated_logTPM_Subset <- Integrated_logTPM[Percent_gene_selection_vector,]
  gene_metadata <- data.frame(primerid  = rownames(Integrated_logTPM_Subset))
  cell_metadata <- onlyBM@meta.data
  cell_metadata$wellKey <- rownames(cell_metadata)

  sca_object <- MAST::FromMatrix(
      exprsArray = as.matrix(Integrated_logTPM_Subset),  
      cData = cell_metadata, 
      fData = gene_metadata,
      check_sanity = TRUE 
  )
  
  rm(list = c("Integrated_logTPM","Integrated_logTPM_Subset"))
  
random_zlm_fit <- MAST::zlm(formula = ~ 1 + Other_vs_AB + nFeature_RNA + (1 | Cell_Line_n/Mouse_n),
                                  sca_object, method = "glmer", ebayes = FALSE,parallel = TRUE)

  random_zlm_summaryBMO <- MAST::summary(random_zlm_fit, doLRT = "Other_vs_ABOther")
  random_summary_dataBMO <- random_zlm_summaryBMO$datatable
  random_logFC_dataBMO <- random_summary_dataBMO[random_summary_dataBMO$contrast == "Other_vs_ABOther" & random_summary_dataBMO$component == "logFC", 
                                 c(1,7,5,6,8)]
  random_hurdle_dataBMO <- random_summary_dataBMO[random_summary_dataBMO$contrast == "Other_vs_ABOther" & random_summary_dataBMO$component == "H", 
                                  c(1,4)]
  mast_random_hurdle_resultsBMO <- merge(random_logFC_dataBMO, random_hurdle_dataBMO, by = "primerid")
  mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO <- stats::na.omit(as.data.frame(mast_random_hurdle_resultsBMO))
  mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO %>% 
    mutate(qvalue = qvalue(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$`Pr(>Chisq)`)$qvalues) %>% 
    arrange(desc(coef))
  
saveRDS(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO, "../BM Publication/MAST_BMOther.rds")
```

```{r Plotting MAST results in BM (BM-A to BM-B)}
#VolcPlot of results
mastResultsDF <- data.frame(Gene = mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$primerid, Log2FC = mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$coef, AdjPValue = mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$`Pr(>Chisq)`, Significant = ifelse(mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$coef > 0.25, "Upregulated", ifelse(mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$coef < -0.25, "Downregulated", "Not Significant")))

top_genes <- mastResultsDF %>%
  filter(Log2FC > 0.25 | Log2FC < -0.25) %>%
  arrange(AdjPValue) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1:40)

VolcanoplotMast <- ggplot(mastResultsDF, aes(x = Log2FC, y = -log10(AdjPValue), color = Significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1000, by = 100), expand = expansion(0, c(0, 100))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Downregulated" = "#990000", #"#00AFBB"
                                "Not significant" = "grey",
                                "Upregulated" = "#FF7F7F")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.25, 0.25), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_genes, aes(label = Gene), size = 2, max.overlaps = 20) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "BM-A against BM-B: Differentially Expressed Genes",
       x = "Average ln Fold Change",
       y = "-log10 P-value")

saveplots(VolcanoplotMast, "../BM Publication/", "Volcanoplot Mast results BM-A to BM-B")
svg("Volcanoplot Mast results BM-A to BM-B.svg")
VolcanoplotMast
dev.off()
VolcanoplotMast

#Cutoff for selecting DEG
hist(mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$`Pr(>Chisq)`)
BMAGenesMast <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$primerid[which(mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$coef > 0.25 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$qvalue < 0.05)]
BMBGenesMast <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$primerid[which(mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$coef < 0.25 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$qvalue < 0.05)]
SignGenesMastBM <- c(BMAGenesMast, BMBGenesMast)

#Dotplot of results
DotPlot(onlyBM, features = BMAGenesMast, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()
DotPlot(onlyBM, features = BMBGenesMast, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()
DotplotBMgenes <- DotPlot(onlyBM, features = SignGenesMastBM, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()

saveplots(DotplotBMgenes, "../BM Publication/", "Dotplot BM-A to BM-B DEG", w = 3000)
svg("Dotplot BM-A to BM-B DEG.svg", width = 20)
DotplotBMgenes
dev.off()
```

```{r Heatmap of BM-A to BM-B DEG}
#Heatmap of results (clustered columns with pdx and type annotation, top 40 BM-A and 40 BM-B genes)
HMBMGenes <- c(BMAGenesMast[1:40], BMBGenesMast[1:40])

HMMatr <- GetAssayData(onlyBM, assay = "SCT", layer = "scale.data")
HMMatr <- HMMatr[order(factor(rownames(HMMatr), levels = HMBMGenes)), ]

HMAnnotations <- HeatmapAnnotation(PDX = onlyBM$Cell_Line_n, Profile = onlyBM$type, col = list(PDX = PDX_colours, Profile = c("BM-A" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B" = "#990000", "Other" = "lightgrey")), annotation_label = c("PDX", "Profile"), show_legend = FALSE)
HMAnnotationRow <- rowAnnotation(Signature = ifelse(rownames(HMMatr) %in% BMAGenesMast, "BM-A DEG", "BM-B DEG"), show_legend = FALSE, col = list(Signature = c("BM-A DEG" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B DEG" = "#990000")), annotation_label = c(" "))

HMBM <- Heatmap(HMMatr, name = "Heatmap", cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = TRUE, show_column_dend = TRUE, show_column_names = FALSE, show_row_dend = FALSE, top_annotation = HMAnnotations, rigth_annotation = HMAnnotationRow, col = col_fun, use_raster = FALSE, column_title = "Heatmap BM-A/B DEG", show_heatmap_legend = FALSE, row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6))

#Lgnds
BMmatrixLGND <- Legend(col_fun = col_fun, title = "Expression")
BMcellLineLGND <- Legend(labels = c("LU-NB-1", "LU-NB-2", "LU-NB-3"), title = "PDX", legend_gp = gpar(fill = PDX_colours))
BMtypeLGND <- Legend(labels = c("BM-A", "BM-B", "Other"), title = "Profile", legend_gp = gpar(fill = c("BM-A" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B" = "#990000", "Other" = "lightgrey")))
BMGeneSignLGND <- Legend(labels = c("BM-A DEG", "BM-B DEG"), title = "Gene signature", legend_gp = gpar(fill = c("BM-A DEG" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B DEG" = "#990000")))
LGNDs4 <- packLegend(matrixLGND, cellLineLGND, typeLGND, GeneSignLGND)

HeatmapBMDEG <- draw(HMBM, annotation_legend_list = LGNDs4)

png("Heatmap BM-A/B DEG.png", width = 3000, height = 3500, res = 300)
HeatmapBMDEG
dev.off()
svg("Heatmap BM-A/B DEG.svg", width = 15, height = 10)
HeatmapBMDEG
dev.off()
```

```{r Plotting BMA to all other}
#VolcPlot of results
mastResultsDF <- data.frame(Gene = mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$primerid, Log2FC = mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$coef, AdjPValue = mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$`Pr(>Chisq)`, Significant = ifelse(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$coef > 0.25, "Upregulated", ifelse(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$coef < -0.25, "Downregulated", "Not Significant")))

top_genes <- mastResultsDF %>%
  filter(Log2FC > 0.25 | Log2FC < -0.25) %>%
  arrange(AdjPValue) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1:40)

VolcanoplotMastBMA <- ggplot(mastResultsDF, aes(x = Log2FC, y = -log10(AdjPValue), color = Significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1000, by = 100), expand = expansion(0, c(0, 100))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Downregulated" = "#990000", #"#00AFBB"
                                "Not significant" = "grey",
                                "Upregulated" = "#FF7F7F")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.25, 0.25), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_genes, aes(label = Gene), size = 2, max.overlaps = 20) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "BM-A to all other cells: Differentially Expressed Genes",
       x = "Average ln Fold Change",
       y = "-log10 P-value")

saveplots(VolcanoplotMastBMA, "../BM Publication/", "Volcanoplot Mast results BM-A to all other")
svg("Volcanoplot Mast results BM-A to all other.svg")
VolcanoplotMastBMA
dev.off()
VolcanoplotMastBMA

#Cutoff for selecting DEG
hist(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$`Pr(>Chisq)`)
BMAUpGenesMast <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$primerid[which(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$coef > 0.25 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$qvalue < 0.05)]
BMADownGenesMast <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$primerid[which(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$coef < 0.25 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$qvalue < 0.05)]
SignGenesMastBMA <- c(BMAUpGenesMast, BMADownGenesMast)

#Dotplot of results
DotPlot(onlyBM, features = BMAUpGenesMast, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()
DotPlot(onlyBM, features = BMADownGenesMast, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()
DotplotBMAgenes <- DotPlot(onlyBM, features = SignGenesMastBMA, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()

saveplots(DotplotBMAgenes, "../BM Publication/", "Dotplot BM-A to all other", w = 3000)
svg("Dotplot BM-A to all other.svg", width = 20)
DotplotBMAgenes
dev.off()
```

```{r Plotting BMB to all other}
#VolcPlot of results
mastResultsDF <- data.frame(Gene = mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$primerid, Log2FC = mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$coef, AdjPValue = mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$`Pr(>Chisq)`, Significant = ifelse(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$coef > 0.25, "Upregulated", ifelse(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$coef < -0.25, "Downregulated", "Not Significant")))

top_genes <- mastResultsDF %>%
  filter(Log2FC > 0.25 | Log2FC < -0.25) %>%
  arrange(AdjPValue) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1:40)

VolcanoplotMastBMB <- ggplot(mastResultsDF, aes(x = Log2FC, y = -log10(AdjPValue), color = Significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1000, by = 100), expand = expansion(0, c(0, 100))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Downregulated" = "#990000", #"#00AFBB"
                                "Not significant" = "grey",
                                "Upregulated" = "#FF7F7F")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.25, 0.25), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_genes, aes(label = Gene), size = 2, max.overlaps = 20) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "BM-B to all other BM cells: Differentially Expressed Genes",
       x = "Average ln Fold Change",
       y = "-log10 P-value")

saveplots(VolcanoplotMastBMB, "../BM Publication/", "Volcanoplot Mast results BM-B to all other")
svg("Volcanoplot Mast results BM-B to all other.svg")
VolcanoplotMastBMB
dev.off()
VolcanoplotMastBMB

#Cutoff for selecting DEG
hist(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$`Pr(>Chisq)`)
BMBUpGenesMast <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$primerid[which(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$coef > 0.25 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$qvalue < 0.05)]
BMBDownGenesMast <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$primerid[which(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$coef < 0.25 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$qvalue < 0.05)]
SignGenesMastBMB <- c(BMBUpGenesMast, BMBDownGenesMast)

#Dotplot of results
DotPlot(onlyBM, features = BMBUpGenesMast, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()
DotPlot(onlyBM, features = BMBDownGenesMast, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()
DotplotBMBgenes <- DotPlot(onlyBM, features = SignGenesMastBMB, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()

saveplots(DotplotBMBgenes, "../BM Publication/", "Dotplot BM-B to all other", w = 3000)
svg("Dotplot BM-B to all other.svg", width = 20)
DotplotBMBgenes
dev.off()
```

```{r Plotting BMOther to BM-A+BM-B}
#VolcPlot of results
mastResultsDF <- data.frame(Gene = mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$primerid, Log2FC = mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$coef, AdjPValue = mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$`Pr(>Chisq)`, Significant = ifelse(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$coef > 0.25, "Upregulated", ifelse(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$coef < -0.25, "Downregulated", "Not Significant")))

top_genes <- mastResultsDF %>%
  filter(Log2FC > 0.25 | Log2FC < -0.25) %>%
  arrange(AdjPValue) %>%
  dplyr::slice(1:40)

VolcanoplotMastBMO <- ggplot(mastResultsDF, aes(x = Log2FC, y = -log10(AdjPValue), color = Significant)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1000, by = 100), expand = expansion(0, c(0, 100))) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Downregulated" = "#990000", #"#00AFBB"
                                "Not significant" = "grey",
                                "Upregulated" = "#FF7F7F")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.25, 0.25), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_text_repel(data = top_genes, aes(label = Gene), size = 2, max.overlaps = 20) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Other against BM-A and BM-B: Differentially Expressed Genes",
       x = "Average ln Fold Change",
       y = "-log10 P-value")

saveplots(VolcanoplotMastBMO, "../BM Publication/", "Volcanoplot Mast results Other to BM-A and BM-B")
svg("Volcanoplot Mast results other to BM-A and BM-B.svg")
VolcanoplotMastBMO
dev.off()
VolcanoplotMastBMO

#Cutoff for selecting DEG
hist(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$`Pr(>Chisq)`)
BMOUpGenesMast <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$primerid[which(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$coef > 0.25 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$qvalue < 0.05)]
BMODownGenesMast <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$primerid[which(mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$coef < 0.25 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.05 & mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$qvalue < 0.05)]
SignGenesMastBMO <- c(BMOUpGenesMast, BMODownGenesMast)

#Dotplot of results
DotPlot(onlyBM, features = BMOUpGenesMast, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()
DotPlot(onlyBM, features = BMODownGenesMast, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()
DotplotBMAgenes <- DotPlot(onlyBM, features = SignGenesMastBMO, group.by = "type") + RotatedAxis()

saveplots(DotplotBMOgenes, "../BM Publication/", "Dotplot BM Other to BM-A and B", w = 3000)
svg("Dotplot BM Other to BM-A and B.svg", width = 20)
DotplotBMOgenes
dev.off()
```

```{r Combined Heatmap of BM-A, BM-B and BM-Other}
#Heatmap of results (clustered columns with pdx and type annotation, top 40 BM-A and 40 BM-B genes)
HMBMGenes2 <- c(BMAUpGenesMast[1:20], BMBUpGenesMast[1:20], BMOUpGenesMast[1:20])

HMMatr <- GetAssayData(onlyBM, assay = "SCT", layer = "scale.data")
HMMatr <- HMMatr[order(factor(rownames(HMMatr), levels = HMBMGenes2)), ]

HMAnnotations <- HeatmapAnnotation(PDX = onlyBM$Cell_Line_n, Profile = onlyBM$type, col = list(PDX = PDX_colours, Profile = c("BM-A" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B" = "#990000", "Other" = "lightgrey")), annotation_label = c("PDX", "Profile"), show_legend = FALSE)
HMAnnotationRow <- rowAnnotation(Signature = ifelse(rownames(HMMatr) %in% BMAUpGenesMast, "BM-A DEG", ifelse(rownames(HMMatr) %in% BMBUpGenesMast, "BM-B DEG", "Other DEG")), show_legend = FALSE, col = list(Signature = c("BM-A DEG" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B DEG" = "#990000", "Other DEG" = "lightgrey")), annotation_label = c(" "))

HMBM2 <- Heatmap(HMMatr, name = "Heatmap", cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_columns = TRUE, show_column_dend = TRUE, show_column_names = FALSE, show_row_dend = FALSE, top_annotation = HMAnnotations, rigth_annotation = HMAnnotationRow, col = col_fun, use_raster = FALSE, column_title = "Heatmap BM type DEG", show_heatmap_legend = FALSE, row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 6))

#Lgnds
BMmatrixLGND <- Legend(col_fun = col_fun, title = "Expression")
BMcellLineLGND <- Legend(labels = c("LU-NB-1", "LU-NB-2", "LU-NB-3"), title = "PDX", legend_gp = gpar(fill = PDX_colours))
BMtypeLGND <- Legend(labels = c("BM-A", "BM-B", "Other"), title = "Profile", legend_gp = gpar(fill = c("BM-A" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B" = "#990000", "Other" = "lightgrey")))
BMGeneSignLGND2 <- Legend(labels = c("BM-A DEG", "BM-B DEG", "Other DEG"), title = "Gene signature", legend_gp = gpar(fill = c("BM-A DEG" = "#FF7F7F", "BM-B DEG" = "#990000", "Other DEG" = "lightgrey")))
LGNDs5 <- packLegend(matrixLGND, cellLineLGND, typeLGND, GeneSignLGND2)

HeatmapBMDEG2 <- draw(HMBM2, annotation_legend_list = LGNDs5)

png("Heatmap BM combined DEG.png", width = 3000, height = 3500, res = 300)
HeatmapBMDEG2
dev.off()
svg("Heatmap BM combined DEG.svg", width = 15, height = 10)
HeatmapBMDEG2
dev.off()
```


```{r gsea from results BM}
#Skapa lista med fold-change
gseaGeneList <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBM$coef
names(gseaGeneList) <- mast_analysis_results$primerid
GeneNameDF <- bitr(names(gseaGeneList), fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db) #översätter till entrez

gseaGeneList <- gseaGeneList[GeneNameDF$SYMBOL]
names(gseaGeneList) <- GeneNameDF$ENTREZID
gseaGeneList <- sort(gseaGeneList, decreasing = TRUE)

#Running GSEA
KEGGResult <- gseKEGG(geneList = gseaGeneList, organism = "hsa", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- gseGO(geneList = gseaGeneList, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- simplify(GOResult, cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min, measure = "Wang")

#Preparing/setting order
DFKEGGResult <- KEGGResult@result
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[DFKEGGResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFKEGGResult <- head(DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(-DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
UpKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES > 0]
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
DownKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownKegg, UpKegg)
DFKEGGResult$Description <- factor(DFKEGGResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All KEGG
KEGGBMAll <- ggplot(DFKEGGResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

#Preparing/setting order
DFGOResult <- GOResult@result
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[DFGOResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFGOResult <- head(DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(-DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
UpGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES > 0]
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
DownGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownGO, UpGO)
DFGOResult$Description <- factor(DFGOResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All GO
GOBMAll <- ggplot(DFGOResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG BM-A/B", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG BM-A/B.svg", width = 20)
KEGGBMAll
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO BM-A/B", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO BM-A/B.svg", width = 20)
GOBMAll
dev.off()

#Selecting top 10
DFKEGG10 <- rbind(head(DFKEGGResult, n = 10), tail(DFKEGGResult, n = 10))
DFGO10 <- rbind(head(DFGOResult, n = 10), tail(DFGOResult, n = 10))

#Plotting top 10
KEGGBM10 <- ggplot(DFKEGG10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
GOBM10 <- ggplot(DFGO10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

saveplots(KEGGBM10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 BM-A/B")
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 BM-A/B.svg")
KEGGBM10
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBM10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO top10 BM-A/B", w = 1100)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO top10 BM-A/B.svg")
GOBM10
dev.off()
```

```{r GSEA from BM-A to all other}
#Skapa lista med fold-change
gseaGeneList <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMA$coef
names(gseaGeneList) <- mast_analysis_results$primerid
GeneNameDF <- bitr(names(gseaGeneList), fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db) #översätter till entrez

gseaGeneList <- gseaGeneList[GeneNameDF$SYMBOL]
names(gseaGeneList) <- GeneNameDF$ENTREZID
gseaGeneList <- sort(gseaGeneList, decreasing = TRUE)
```
