```{r GSEA from BM-A to all other}
#Running GSEA
KEGGResult <- gseKEGG(geneList = gseaGeneList, organism = "hsa", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- gseGO(geneList = gseaGeneList, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- simplify(GOResult, cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min, measure = "Wang")

#Preparing/setting order
DFKEGGResult <- KEGGResult@result
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[DFKEGGResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFKEGGResult <- head(DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(-DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
UpKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES > 0]
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
DownKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownKegg, UpKegg)
DFKEGGResult$Description <- factor(DFKEGGResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All KEGG
KEGGBMAAll <- ggplot(DFKEGGResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

#Preparing/setting order
DFGOResult <- GOResult@result
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[DFGOResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFGOResult <- head(DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(-DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
UpGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES > 0]
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
DownGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownGO, UpGO)
DFGOResult$Description <- factor(DFGOResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All GO
GOBMAAll <- ggplot(DFGOResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMAAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG BM-A to all other", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG BM-A to all other.svg", width = 20)
KEGGBMAAll
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMAAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO BM-A to all other", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO BM-A to all other.svg", width = 20)
GOBMAAll
dev.off()

#Selecting top 10
DFKEGG10 <- rbind(head(DFKEGGResult, n = 10), tail(DFKEGGResult, n = 10))
DFGO10 <- rbind(head(DFGOResult, n = 10), tail(DFGOResult, n = 10))

#Plotting top 10
KEGGBMA10 <- ggplot(DFKEGG10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
GOBMA10 <- ggplot(DFGO10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMA10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 BM-A to all other")
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 BM-A to all other.svg")
KEGGBMA10
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMA10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO top10 BM-A to all other", w = 1100)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO top10 BM-A to all other.svg")
GOBMA10
dev.off()
```

```{r GSEA from BM-B to all other}
#Skapa lista med fold-change
gseaGeneList <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMB$coef
names(gseaGeneList) <- mast_analysis_results$primerid
GeneNameDF <- bitr(names(gseaGeneList), fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db) #översätter till entrez

gseaGeneList <- gseaGeneList[GeneNameDF$SYMBOL]
names(gseaGeneList) <- GeneNameDF$ENTREZID
gseaGeneList <- sort(gseaGeneList, decreasing = TRUE)

#Running GSEA
KEGGResult <- gseKEGG(geneList = gseaGeneList, organism = "hsa", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- gseGO(geneList = gseaGeneList, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- simplify(GOResult, cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min, measure = "Wang")

#Preparing/setting order
DFKEGGResult <- KEGGResult@result
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[DFKEGGResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFKEGGResult <- head(DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(-DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
UpKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES > 0]
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
DownKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownKegg, UpKegg)
DFKEGGResult$Description <- factor(DFKEGGResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All KEGG
KEGGBMBAll <- ggplot(DFKEGGResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

#Preparing/setting order
DFGOResult <- GOResult@result
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[DFGOResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFGOResult <- head(DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(-DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
UpGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES > 0]
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
DownGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownGO, UpGO)
DFGOResult$Description <- factor(DFGOResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All GO
GOBMBAll <- ggplot(DFGOResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMBAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG BM-B to all other", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG BM-B to all other.svg", width = 20)
KEGGBMBAll
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMBAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO BM-B to all other", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO BM-B to all other.svg", width = 20)
GOBMBAll
dev.off()

#Selecting top 10
DFKEGG10 <- rbind(head(DFKEGGResult, n = 10), tail(DFKEGGResult, n = 10))
DFGO10 <- rbind(head(DFGOResult, n = 10), tail(DFGOResult, n = 10))

#Plotting top 10
KEGGBMB10 <- ggplot(DFKEGG10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
GOBMB10 <- ggplot(DFGO10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMB10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 BM-B to all other")
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 BM-B to all other.svg")
KEGGBMB10
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMB10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO top10 BM-B to all other", w = 1100)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO top10 BM-B to all other.svg")
GOBMB10
dev.off()
```

```{r GSEA from BM-O to BM-A and B}
#Skapa lista med fold-change
gseaGeneList <- mast_random_analysis_resultsBMO$coef
names(gseaGeneList) <- mast_analysis_results$primerid
GeneNameDF <- bitr(names(gseaGeneList), fromType = "SYMBOL", toType = "ENTREZID", OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db) #översätter till entrez

gseaGeneList <- gseaGeneList[GeneNameDF$SYMBOL]
names(gseaGeneList) <- GeneNameDF$ENTREZID
gseaGeneList <- sort(gseaGeneList, decreasing = TRUE)

#Running GSEA
KEGGResult <- gseKEGG(geneList = gseaGeneList, organism = "hsa", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- gseGO(geneList = gseaGeneList, OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db, keyType = "ENTREZID", ont = "BP", pvalueCutoff = 0.05, verbose = FALSE)
GOResult <- simplify(GOResult, cutoff = 0.7, by = "p.adjust", select_fun = min, measure = "Wang")

#Preparing/setting order
DFKEGGResult <- KEGGResult@result
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[DFKEGGResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFKEGGResult <- head(DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(-DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
UpKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES > 0]
DFKEGGResult <- DFKEGGResult[order(DFKEGGResult$p.adjust), ]
DownKegg <- DFKEGGResult$Description[DFKEGGResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownKegg, UpKegg)
DFKEGGResult$Description <- factor(DFKEGGResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All KEGG
KEGGBMOAll <- ggplot(DFKEGGResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

#Preparing/setting order
DFGOResult <- GOResult@result
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[DFGOResult$p.adjust < 0.05, ]
DFGOResult <- head(DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ], 100)
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(-DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
UpGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES > 0]
DFGOResult <- DFGOResult[order(DFGOResult$p.adjust), ]
DownGO <- DFGOResult$Description[DFGOResult$NES < 0]
order <- c(DownGO, UpGO)
DFGOResult$Description <- factor(DFGOResult$Description, levels = order)

#Plotting All GO
GOBMOAll <- ggplot(DFGOResult, aes(x = Description, y = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), 
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 60, hjust = 1)
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMOAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG other to BM-A and B", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG other to BM-A and B.svg", width = 20)
KEGGBMOAll
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMOAll, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO other to BM-A and B", w = 2000)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO other to BM-A and B.svg", width = 20)
GOBMOAll
dev.off()

#Selecting top 10
DFKEGG10 <- rbind(head(DFKEGGResult, n = 10), tail(DFKEGGResult, n = 10))
DFGO10 <- rbind(head(DFGOResult, n = 10), tail(DFGOResult, n = 10))

#Plotting top 10
KEGGBMO10 <- ggplot(DFKEGG10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "KEGG GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
GOBMO10 <- ggplot(DFGO10, aes(x = ifelse(NES < 0, log(p.adjust), -log(p.adjust)), y = Description, fill = NES)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.8) +
  labs(x = "-log 10 Adjusted P-value", y = NULL, title = "GO GSEA") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low  = "blue", high = "red", name = "NES") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

saveplots(KEGGBMO10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 other to BM-A and B")
svg("Barplot GSEA KEGG top10 other to BM-A and B.svg")
KEGGBMO10
dev.off()
saveplots(GOBMA10, "../BM Publication/", "Barplot GSEA GO top10 other to BM-A and B", w = 1100)
svg("Barplot GSEA GO top10 other to BM-A and B.svg")
GOBMO10
dev.off()
```


```{r Comparing between different DEG lists}
#Venn diagram
venn.plot <- venn.diagram(
  x = list("BM-A original" = BMAGenes, "BM-B original" = BMBgenes, "BM-A DEG" = BMAGenesMast, "BM-B DEG" = BMBGenesMast, "BM-A Like DEG" = UpGenesMastBMALike, "BM-B Like DEG" = UpGenesMastBMBLike),
  category.names = c("BM-A original", "BM-B original", "BM-A DEG", "BM-B DEG", "BM-A Like DEG", "BM-B Like DEG"),
  filename = NULL,
  fill = c("#F4C40FFF", "#FE9B00FF", "#D8443CFF", "#9B3441FF", "#DE597CFF", "#E87B89FF"),
  alpha = 0.6,
  col = "black",
  lwd = 2,
  cex = 2,
  fontface = "bold",
  cat.fontface = "bold",
  cat.col = c("#F4C40FFF", "#FE9B00FF", "#D8443CFF", "#9B3441FF", "#DE597CFF", "#E87B89FF"),
  margin = 0.1,
  output=TRUE
)
venn.plot

#Venn diagram
venn.plot2 <- venn.diagram(
  x = list("BM-A original" = BMAGenes, "BM-B original" = BMBgenes, "BM-A DEG" = BMAGenesMast, "BM-B DEG" = BMBGenesMast, "BM-A Like DEG" = UpGenesMastBMALike, "BM-B Like DEG" = UpGenesMastBMBLike, "BM-A DEG 2" = BMAUpGenesMast, "BM-B DEG 2" = BMBUpGenesMast, "BM Other DEG" = BMOUpGenesMast),
  category.names = c("BM-A original", "BM-B original", "BM-A DEG", "BM-B DEG", "BM-A Like DEG", "BM-B Like DEG", "BM-A DEG 2", "BM-B DEG 2", "BM Other DEG"),
  filename = NULL,
  fill = c("#F4C40FFF", "#FE9B00FF", "#D8443CFF", "#9B3441FF", "#DE597CFF", "#E87B89FF", "#E6A2A6FF", "#AA7AA1FF", "#9F5691FF"),
  alpha = 0.6,
  col = "black",
  lwd = 2,
  cex = 2,
  fontface = "bold",
  cat.fontface = "bold",
  cat.col = c("#F4C40FFF", "#FE9B00FF", "#D8443CFF", "#9B3441FF", "#DE597CFF", "#E87B89FF", "#E6A2A6FF", "#AA7AA1FF", "#9F5691FF"),
  margin = 0.1,
  output=TRUE
)
venn.plot2
```

```{Monocle in all cells (PT as startpoint and BM as endpoint)}
#Creatning object
DefaultAssay(IntegratedObject) <- "RNA"
cds <- SeuratWrappers::as.cell_data_set(IntegratedObject)

#Checking
class(cds)
reducedDims(cds)
names(colData(cds))

#Transfering umap
reducedDims(cds)$UMAP <- Embeddings(IntegratedObject, "umap.harmony")
reducedDims(cds)

#Transfering clusters
clusters <- IntegratedObject$seurat_clusters
names(clusters) <- colnames(IntegratedObject)
cds@clusters$UMAP$clusters <- clusters

#Setting 1 partition?
#partitions <- factor(rep(1, ncol(cds)))
#names(partitions) <- colnames(cds)
#cds@clusters$UMAP$partitions <- partitions

plot_cells(cds, show_trajectory_graph = FALSE, color_cells_by = "seurat_clusters", label_groups_by_cluster = TRUE, label_leaves = TRUE, label_branch_points = TRUE)
plot_cells(cds, show_trajectory_graph = FALSE, color_cells_by = "partition")

#For selecting starting cluster
#root_cells <- colnames(cds)[
#  cds@clusters$UMAP$clusters == "?3?"
#]

cds <- learn_graph(cds, use_partition = FALSE)
cds <- order_cells(cds) #Picking startpoint (possible to pick endpoint and reverse, har for 2 endpoints?)

plot_cells(cds, color_cells_by = "pseudotime")

#Findning DEG among path
cds_pt_res <- graph_test(cds, neighbor_graph = "principal_graph", cores = 4)
cds_pt_res <- na.omit(cds_pt_res)
cds_pt_res <- cds_pt_res[cds_pt_res$p_value < 0.05 & cds_pt_res$status == "OK", ]
cds_pt_res[order(-cds_pt_res$morans_test_statistic), ]
cds_pt_res

#Plotting interesting genes
plot_cells(cds, genes = c("Gene1", "Gene2", "Gene3", "Gene4"))

saveRDS(cds, "Monocle PT.rds")
saveRDS(cds, "Monocle PT genes.rds")
```

```{Monocle in only BM cells (BM-A and BM-B as startpoints)}
#Creatning object
DefaultAssay(onlyBM) <- "RNA"
cdsBM <- SeuratWrappers::as.cell_data_set(onlyBM)

#Checking
class(cdsBM)
reducedDims(cdsBM)
names(colData(cdsBM))

#Transfering umap
reducedDims(cdsBM)$UMAP <- Embeddings(onlyBM, "umap.harmony")
reducedDims(cdsBM)

#Transfering clusters
clusters <- onlyBM$seurat_clusters
names(clusters) <- colnames(onlyBM)
cdsBM@clusters$UMAP$clusters <- clusters

#Setting 1 partition?
#partitions <- factor(rep(1, ncol(cdsBM)))
#names(partitions) <- colnames(cdsBM)
#cdsBM@clusters$UMAP$partitions <- partitions

plot_cells(cdsBM, show_trajectory_graph = FALSE, color_cells_by = "seurat_clusters", label_groups_by_cluster = TRUE, label_leaves = TRUE, label_branch_points = TRUE)
plot_cells(cdsBM, show_trajectory_graph = FALSE, color_cells_by = "partition")

#For selecting starting cluster
#root_cells <- colnames(cds)[
#  cds@clusters$UMAP$clusters == "?3?"
#]

cdsBM <- learn_graph(cdsBM, use_partition = FALSE)
cdsBM <- order_cells(cdsBM) #Picking startpoint (possible to pick endpoint and reverse, har for 2 endpoints?)

plot_cells(cdsBM, color_cells_by = "pseudotime")

#Findning DEG among path
cds_pt_resBM <- graph_test(cdsBM, neighbor_graph = "principal_graph", cores = 4)
cds_pt_resBM <- na.omit(cds_pt_resBM)
cds_pt_resBM <- cds_pt_resBM[cds_pt_resBM$p_value < 0.05 & cds_pt_resBM$status == "OK", ]
cds_pt_resBM[order(-cds_pt_resBM$morans_test_statistic), ]
cds_pt_resBM

#Plotting interesting genes
plot_cells(cdsBM, genes = c("Gene1", "Gene2", "Gene3", "Gene4"))

saveRDS(cds, "Monocle BM.rds")
saveRDS(cds, "Monocle BM genes.rds")
```
